metadata.title: Payroll | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered payroll management platform for all your compensation operations — from salary rules and payslip batches to work entries, accounting integration, and employee portal.

hero.title: Payroll
hero.description: Automate payslips, contracts, work entries, deductions, benefits, and salary payments from one accurate payroll system.

generateSection.title: Generate payslips
generateSection.description: Create payslips from employee contracts, work entries, attendance, time off, and salary rules without manual calculation.

salaryRulesSection.title: Flexible
salaryRulesSection.description: Build payroll structures with basic wage, allowances, deductions, tax rules, reimbursements, benefits, and employer contributions.

workEntriesSection.title: Work entries
workEntriesSection.description: Connect contracts, attendance, planning, and time off to create accurate payroll inputs before payslips are calculated.

payslipSection.title: Clear payslips,
payslipSection.description: Give employees transparent payslips with earnings, deductions, benefits, worked time, and net salary clearly explained.

reportingSection.title: Payroll reporting
reportingSection.description: Understand salary cost, taxes, departments, deductions, and payroll trends with clean visual reporting.

features.title: Salary rules
features.description: Create flexible salary structures, allowances, deductions, benefits, and country-specific payroll rules.

features.title: Payslip batches
features.description: Generate payslips for teams, departments, or the whole company in a clean batch workflow.

features.title: Work entries
features.description: Connect attendance, time off, planning, and contracts to calculate accurate payroll inputs.

features.title: Accounting integration
features.description: Post salary expenses, liabilities, and journal entries directly to your accounting system.

features.title: Employee portal
features.description: Let employees access payslips, contracts, benefits, and payroll documents securely.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Payroll used to take days of spreadsheet checks. Now payslips, deductions, work entries, and salary reports are generated in one place.
testimonial.name: Laura Johnson
